clues.text: This Durham charter school serves students from kindergarten through high school on one campus.
Its public-facing story emphasizes project-based learning.
The school appears prominently in Charter Success Partners background materials.
Its official name suggests travel, exploration, or a long journey.
The school has been described publicly as having roughly 1,200 students.
The answer begins with the letter V.
This school is in Asheville and serves younger learners rather than a full K-12 span.
Its official name includes the full name of a person.
The answer ends with a phrase that directly references children.
It is smaller than many statewide charter campuses.
The school name contains four words before the phrase 'for Children.'
The answer begins with the letter F.
